introSection: Family Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Wildlife World in Litchfield Park, Arizona, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The park announced in March 2013 that they would add a family roller coaster as part of a new exhibit. The coaster opened alongside the new Adventureland area on February 1, 2016.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This roller coaster is built over a llama enclosure.

fullText:
Family Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Wildlife World in Litchfield Park, Arizona, USA.

The park announced in March 2013 that they would add a family roller coaster as part of a new exhibit. The coaster opened alongside the new Adventureland area on February 1, 2016.

This roller coaster is built over a llama enclosure.
